visual_description: A man with short dark hair holds a white telephone receiver to his ear in a dimly lit office, his expression focused. He then stands in a light-colored shirt, looking forward while another man sits nearby on a phone. He moves across the room, passing a woman at a desk and another seated man, gesturing with his arms.
audio_description: The man speaks into the telephone with a serious tone. Faint office ambient sounds are audible.
